The MGS model is a model of [[Sapients|Sapient]] psychology and [[phenotype]] under which the mind and body and its causes are divided into [[memes]], [[genes]], and [[scenes]]. 

Although there are three elements, like the Greek divine trio of Zeus, Poseidon, and Hades, there are no clear correlations with [[Alo]].{{efn|Genes-Alpha, Scenes-Lambda, Memes-Omega  is a possible way of looking at it}} 

== Etymology ==
The model is derived from Metal Gear Solid in which the first three games are themed after [[genes]], [[memes]], and [[scenes]] respectively.
[[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:MGS model]][[sn:MGS model]][[Category:MGS model]]
[[sn:MGS model]]==Footnotes==
{{notelist}}
[[Category:Pages]]
